cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Bob ends up after all those swaps. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts in a specific position. Original positions: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me track each swap step by step. First swap: Dave and Bob trade positions. So after this, Dave is right midfielder and Bob becomes cheerleader? Wait, no. Wait, original positions: Bob is right midfielder, Dave is cheerleader. So swapping them would make Bob the cheerleader and Dave the right midfielder. Let me note that. After first swap (Dave and Bob): - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: goalkeeper Second swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. So Dave was right midfielder, Eve is goalkeeper. After swapping, Dave is goalkeeper and Eve is right midfielder. After second swap (Dave and Eve): - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Alice is right winger, Bob is cheerleader. So after swapping, Alice becomes cheerleader and Bob becomes right winger. After third swap (Alice and Bob): - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Fourth swap: Dave and Claire trade positions. Dave is goalkeeper, Claire is left winger. After swapping, Dave is left winger and Claire is goalkeeper. After fourth swap (Dave and Claire): - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: left winger - Eve: right midfielder Fifth swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. Dave is left winger, Eve is right midfielder. Swapping them would make Dave right midfielder and Eve left winger. After fifth swap (Dave and Eve): - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: left winger So the question is, at the end of the match, what position is Bob playing? According to the final positions above, Bob is right winger. So the answer is (A) right winger. Let me check once again to make sure I didn't make a mistake. Original positions: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper First swap (Dave and Bob): - Bob becomes cheerleader, Dave becomes right midfielder. Second swap (Dave and Eve): - Dave becomes goalkeeper, Eve becomes right midfielder. Third swap (Alice and Bob): - Alice becomes cheerleader, Bob becomes right winger. Fourth swap (Dave and Claire): - Dave becomes left winger, Claire becomes goalkeeper. Fifth swap (Dave and Eve): - Dave becomes right midfielder, Eve becomes left
